subject: Add wait for plugin upload
commit_message:
Add wait for plugin upload

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-1436
Change-Id: I626af50c6c00e39b8879abf742894c54e03c0386
Signed-off-by: Jack Lucas <jflucas@research.att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

TEST RESULTS FOR OOM/DCAE
2019-04-15
Partial deployment of ONAP (consul, dcaegen, dmaap, log, msb, policy, robot, sdc)
